mapper.sql: id, poi_id, name, type, longitude, latitude, description, opening_hours, source, saved_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM saved_place ORDER BY saved_at DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM saved_place WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM saved_place WHERE poi_id = #{poiId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO saved_place ( poi_id, name, type, longitude, latitude, description, opening_hours, source, saved_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{poiId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{description}, #{openingHours}, #{source}, COALESCE(#{savedAt}, NOW()), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE saved_place SET poi_id = #{poiId}, name = #{name}, type = #{type}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, description = #{description}, opening_hours = #{openingHours}, source = #{source}, saved_at = COALESCE(#{savedAt}, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE saved_place SET name = #{name}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
